reviews.comment:
A pesar de su excelente predisposicion para cargar nafta,solo había un solo operario, por lo cual genera colas de espera considerablemente largas. El resto excelente sobre todo la limpieza de los baños

(Translated by Google)
Despite their excellent service for refueling, there was only one attendant, which resulted in considerably long queues. Everything else was excellent, especially the cleanliness of the restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2dW96X3h3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estacion. El alojamiento esta reformado a nuevo y está muy comodo. Justo de la mano de en frete a la estación, sobre la rivera. El restaurant estaba exclusivo para los alojados ( supongo por protocolo Covid). La comida bien, rica y sencilla.

(Translated by Google)
Very good station. The accommodation is newly renovated and very comfortable. Right across the street from the station, on the riverbank. The restaurant was exclusively for guests (I suppose due to Covid protocols). The food was good, tasty, and simple.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2d3NPVmdnRRAB
